channel.title: susi.vidal
channel.description: trying to make cooking fun stay horngry 📧: team@susividal.com

item.title: Everything i grilled for my friends while camping this weekend !...
item.description:
Everything i grilled for my friends while camping this weekend !! I definitely want to emphasize I did not do this on my own lmaooo a ton of them helped grill, make drinks, and set up! It was a blast and we ate everything!! Zero leftovers 😎 Dinner details: -chips, pico, and guac -corn and flour tortillas -carne asada and chicken tacos -taco toppings: cilantro, onion, tomato, cotija cheese, lime -grilled squash and onions (I was going for calabacitas vibes, I added olive oil, salt, oregano and cumin!) -grilled corn (salt and butter) -grilled Anaheim peppers (oil and salt) -chipotle crema and lime/garlic/cilantro crema **had a late appearance to the party lmaoo
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: I’ve been living 🥹 the happiest I’ve been in 4 months ft ...
item.description:
I’ve been living 🥹 the happiest I’ve been in 4 months ft the best chicken parm !! (according to my neighbor and I, and …. your mom) recipe is from ended up substituting miso for anchovies because weirdly my store didn’t have them? Still amazing
@Giada De Laurentiis

item.title: Hi 🥹 first things first, ignore my beautiful stye. I was goin...
item.description:
Hi 🥹 first things first, ignore my beautiful stye. I was going to wait to post until it was gone but we’re going on week 3 with it, I fear she’s here to stay for a bit. Thank you to everyone who’s reached out, given me encouragement or shared similar stories. Your perseverance has inspired me immensely I dont think I have all the words for how im doing. It feels like a loss of identity, and im grieving a part of myself that meant the world. I’m trying to remain grateful (because fuck, I have so much to be grateful for). To be honest, recently ive had more good days than bad. Baby steps. I think I’m on the mend but we all know grief isn’t linear. Thanks for sticking around 🫶 PS I LOVE THIS CAULIFLOWER KORMA RECIPE FROM
@Sohla El-Waylly
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: favorite tbi symptom is for sure zoning out into oblivion Least...
item.description:
favorite tbi symptom is for sure zoning out into oblivion Least favorite? Still can’t smell or taste 🤧
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: TBI updates! I wasn’t sure what to touch on (I’m still not) ...
item.description:
TBI updates! I wasn’t sure what to touch on (I’m still not) but this is a decent summary. The pain is slowly getting better but I still have a pretty long recovery ahead. I’ll most likely have concussion symptoms for at least 2 more months. I’m trying to focus on healing and doing whatever I can to have optimal recovery for my brain. I have a CT scan and follow ups soon. The neurologist was unsure when/and if I’ll receive my smell and taste back, he seemed more on the optimistic side though. Thanks to everyone reaching out and sending love. I’ve also been nonstop thinking of those who have experienced a TBI/severe concussion and mental health issues, sending you all love too ❤️ PS Sorry for Stella chewing her bone the entire time, it’s way louder than I expected LMAO
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
